note: Hand-curated kid-friendly food + activity spots in Bay Area cities where OpenStreetMap coverage is thin. Names and locations are approximate to real downtown blocks; nothing is verified. Treat this as a STARTER set — open each entry's url, confirm hours/menu, then flip verified:true. Goal is to give every city a reasonable seed list rather than have plans repeat the same handful of spots.
